subject: DevOps
title: Cloud Migration Strategies
description: A short lesson to help you apply Cloud Migration Strategies.

hook.text: Moving to the cloud! But how? Lift-and-shift or rewrite? The six Rs guide the decision.

buildup.text: The 6 Rs: Rehost, Replatform, Repurchase, Refactor, Retire, and Retain. One per workload.

discovery.text: Rehosting is fastest: move VMs as-is. Quick cloud entry but no cloud-native benefits.

twist.text: Refactoring takes longer but pays off: auto-scaling, managed services, and less ops burden.

climax.text: Most migrations mix strategies. Rehost legacy, refactor critical apps, retire unused ones.

punchline.text: No single R fits all. Assess each app and pick the right one.

quiz.question: What does 'rehost' mean in cloud migration?
options: Move applications to the cloud as-is without modification
Rewrite the application from scratch for the cloud
Host the application on multiple cloud providers simultaneously
